decisions.what: Wrapped each Lucide icon in a flex container inside the rounded-2xl bg badge
decisions.why: Spec requested fixed w-16 h-16 box for the icon. Centering the icon ensures proper visual alignment regardless of intrinsic SVG size.

decisions.what: Used React.Fragment to render connector elements between steps
decisions.why: Spec calls for connector divs between (not inside) step cards while keeping a flex layout. Fragments avoid wrapper divs that would break the flex flow.

decisions.what: Implemented top/bottom gradient borders as absolutely positioned 1px gradient strips
decisions.why: Spec asked for 'subtle top/bottom gradient borders' on the section. Pseudo-1px gradients render reliably across browsers without relying on border-image quirks.
